input.background: Table 5.1 lists the probability mass function for the four patients illustrative pmf. Notice that: - Property 1. All probabilities in the pmf are between 0 and 1. - Property 2. Probabilities in the sample space sum to exactly 1.
input.question: Verify that the probabilities in the sample space sum to exactly 1.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

Number_of_success.description: The number of successes in the probability mass function.

Probability.description: The probability associated with each number of successes.
